questions.question: State the difference between a null hypothesis and an alternative hypothesis in the context of statistical hypothesis testing. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: A/B testing, hypothesis testing, resampling, statistical power

questions.question: A researcher conducts an A/B testing experiment to evaluate the effectiveness of a new marketing campaign. The null hypothesis is that the new campaign has no significant effect on sales. What does this imply about the expected outcome of the experiment?
questions.hint: A/B testing, hypothesis testing, resampling, statistical power

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using resampling methods (such as bootstrapping) in statistical hypothesis testing? Provide a specific example to support your answer.
